title: libanotis korovinii
intro: Libanotis korovinii, also known as Korovin's libanotis or Sosnowsky's mountain centaury, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation and fever. The plant is rich in essential oils, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that provide health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Libanotis korovinii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
